title: For Trump, Resuming Combat in Iran Would Be Risky, Even if Cease-Fire Expires
summary_full: President Trump knows that even if a cease-fire runs out with no final agreement on the issues dividing Washington and Tehran, the political risk of renewing hostilities is high.
summary_public: President Trump knows that even if a cease-fire runs out with no final agreement on the issues dividing Washington and Tehran, the political risk of renewing hostilities is high.
